summary: All 3 bug fixes verified working: Quick Search detail dialog, Weight Discrepancy page, PDF watermark tiling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bug fixes verified: 1) Quick Search click opens SearchDetailDialog for non-entry types (Cash Book, etc.) with 'Band karein' close button and 'Go to Tab' button, 2) Mill Entry click opens View Entry dialog with full details, 3) Weight Discrepancy page loads without errors - Input import and mandiList.map fixes working, Agent/Mandi dropdowns properly populated, 4) PDF watermark settings enabled with tiled pattern configuration
